caption: A man with glasses and a tall, silver-grey wig is speaking into a professional microphone in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and beige suspenders, with large black headphones over his ears. Behind him, the walls are decorated with framed photographs and racks of clothing, including shirts with "LEE" branding. A logo on the screen reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, continuing to speak while subtly shifting his facial expressions and head position. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up, while the background elements and equipment, including the microphone and the "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" overlay, stay constant throughout the sequence.
